# Q 

2 

M 

BUG&GRIME

## Exterior / maintenance

### Dedicated pre wash cleaner for insects and road grime.

Q²M Bug & Grime is a strong and efficient pre-wash product designed to quickly and safely remove insects and road grime. It effectively dissolves contamination, allowing for a safer and easier wash process afterwards. The formula works fast and is safe for use on coated surfaces.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_buggrime_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Strong and effective bug and grime remover.

Q²M Bug & Grime simplifies the removal of stubborn insect residue and heavy grime that regular shampoos struggle with. It prepares the surface for washing and helps reduce the risk of scratches during the main wash stage.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons13.svg)

EASY BUG REMOVAL 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons25.svg)

HIGHLY CONCENTRATED 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons19.svg)

SUITABLE ON ALL SURFACES 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mbuggrime.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

COATING SAFE

yes

PH LEVEL

11

Consumption

80-150ml / car

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

BUG&GRIME

01
Spray Q²M Bug & Grime onto affected areas. 

02
Allow the product to dwell briefly without drying. 

03
Rinse thoroughly with a pressure washer. 

04
Repeat or agitate gently if needed. 

05
Continue with the regular wash process. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Is Q²M Bug & Grime safe for ceramic coatings? 

Yes. It is safe for coated and uncoated surfaces. Bear in mind excessive use may impact the hydrophobic properties of a coating.

02
Can it remove old insect residue? 

As long as it is not etched in the clearcoat, yes.

03
Does it require agitation? 

Usually no, but light agitation can help with heavy contamination.

04
Can it be used on all exterior surfaces? 

Yes. It is safe for typical exterior vehicle surfaces.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000260498-Q-M-Bug-Grime)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
